case_title: XIAOMEI MA VS. XING QING GONG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GONG, XING QING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,308.99 FILED BY MA, XIAOMEI AS TO DEFENDANT GONG, XING QING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, XIAOMEI AS TO DEFENDANT GONG, XING QING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT BY HER HUSBAND RANDOLPH K. WONG. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---KWEI CHAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, XIAOMEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONG, XING QING $5,308.99 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,398.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
